## VCF2PopTree
Downloading [VCF2PopTree](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6901002/) was a little weird, they have a github which you download the program from, and then render the html from the downloads folder of your computer.

On the Github, download the ZIP, and then open it in your mac /Downloads

<img width="974" height="913" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 6 34 01 PM" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c1491545-604a-4ac9-a57d-fa57922799c0" />


Then open this link with your local path in a regular web browser

```
file:///Users/madelineeppley/Downloads/vcf2pop-master/VCF2PopTree.html
```

Upload your .vcf file into VCF2PopTree

<img width="737" height="607" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 6 32 35 PM" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c562f5bd-5ce1-4711-b780-37bc82bd00e4" />

Output tree in NEWICK file format

